dimensions.note: No new credential paths; AWS models continue to rely on environment/profile credential resolution, and report-only extensions introduce no secrets.
No logging calls changed; dependency/version refresh does not add sensitive or interpolated log output.
No control-flow or catch/throw behavior changed; SDK/package upgrade preserves existing error paths for current call sites.
Pinned dependency refresh is covered by existing typecheck, unit, smoke, quality, and dry-run gates in deno task check.
Report-only extension; it renders collected workflow data and does not create/update/delete external resources.
No direct external API client in this extension; it consumes swamp data/artifacts only.
No new files, handles, network clients, or cleanup paths introduced by the import-version refresh.
Manifest version and exported model/report version are aligned at 2026.06.22.0 where applicable; no additional files added to package surface.
